## Trust Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal user data, carrier credentials, private keys, or supplier-confidential material are included.
- [ ] Consequential actions have visible approval, ledger emission, and recovery behavior.
- [ ] Sensitive data has retention, deletion, and consent handling.
- [ ] User-facing claims are backed by a test, prototype, scorecard, or ADR.
- [ ] Hardware, operator, emergency, or support impact is explicitly called out.
